name: One-Pan Potatoes & Chicken Dijon
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breasts, sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave potatoes for 8-10 minutes until tender.
2. While the potatoes cook, in a large skillet brown the chicken in oil over high heat for 5 minutes.
3. Add the potatoes to the skillet; sauté and toss until lightly browned.
4. Add BBQ sauce and tarragon; continue tossing until heated through.
5. Total time: 20 minutes.
